---
name: Device / Model Confirmation
about: Report that llamdrop works (or doesn't work) on your device
title: "[DEVICE] <Model> on <Chipset>"
labels: device-report
assignees: ''
---

## Device details

| Field | Your answer |
|---|---|
| Device name | e.g. Redmi Note 11 |
| Chipset | e.g. Snapdragon 680 |
| Total RAM | e.g. 6 GB |
| OS / Platform | e.g. Android / Termux |
| llamdrop version | e.g. v0.3.0 |

## Model tested

| Field | Your answer |
|---|---|
| Model name | e.g. Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct |
| Quantization | e.g. Q4_K_M |
| Result | ✅ Stable / ⚠️ Marginal / ❌ Crashed |
| Free RAM during test | e.g. ~2.8 GB |

## Notes

<!-- Anything specific: how long it ran, speed, any quirks, whether Vulkan was tried -->

## Are you willing to be credited?

<!-- Yes / No — if yes, your GitHub username will be added to the device list -->
